reason: A model-local Python 3.10 virtual environment created from an existing Python 3.10 interpreter is the lowest-risk executable path on this host. It preserves repo-native pip installation guidance, avoids host-level conda mutation, and does not require unavailable uv or docker tooling.
evidence: GitHub README setup recommends Python 3.10 and pip installation for both PyPI and source flows.
GitHub pyproject.toml declares package name 'fireredvad' and requires-python >=3.10.
Local preflight: /opt/anaconda3/envs/fireredvad/bin/python is available and reports Python 3.10.20.
